title: 15 Amazon Prime Day Apple Deals That Are Actually Good
author: Louryn Strampe
text:
Amazon Prime Day June 2026Absolute Best Amazon Prime Day DealsApple Watch DealsHeadphones DealsMesh Wi-Fi Router DealsOura Ring DealsVacuum Cleaner DealsBeauty Tech DealsWalmart DealsDeals on Power BanksSmart Bird Feeder DealsDeals Under $30Action Camera DealsAll products featured on WIRED are independently selected by our editors. However, we may receive compensation from retailers and/or from purchases of products through these links. Learn more.Amazon Prime Day is one of the most reliable ways to save on Apple devices. Apple gadgets go on sale pretty often, but Prime Day Apple deals bring some of the best discounts on basically every iteration of Apple gear worth buying. We test Apple year-round at WIRED and have hunted down the best discounts on the gear we'd recommend to our friends and family members. If you're in the market for new AirPods, an iPad, or maybe just a new case or MagSafe accessory, you'll find our favorite discounts below.Feel free to check out our list of the Absolute Best Prime Day Deals, or come hang out with us at our Amazon Prime Day live blog for unhinged commentary and deals we aren't sharing elsewhere.Updated 5:30 am ET, June 24: We've added deals on Apple's AirPods Pro 3, Belkin's 3-in-1 charger, and a power bank and charger from Anker.The Best Prime Day Apple DealsBest Device DealsBest MagSafe and Accessory DealsBest Case DealsBest Apple Device DealsPhotograph: Parker HallReview: Apple AirPods Pro 3Review: Apple AirPods Pro 3AppleAirPods Pro 3$249 $179 (28% off) Amazon$250 $180 (28% off) Best Buy$249 AppleOne of the best tech deals we've seen this year is on Apple's flagship Apple AirPods Pro 3. Music sounds fantastic on these buds; they offer the best noise cancellation around and deliver excellent call quality. Apple added more ear tips for a better fit for small ears, new tools like heart rate sensing and live translation, and enhanced support for folks with hearing loss. If you use an iPhone, these are the wireless earbuds for you, and I've never seen them cheaper than this.Most PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampePhotograph: Brenda StolyarPhotograph: Brenda StolyarAppleiPad (2025, A16)$349 $299 (14% off) Amazon$349 $299 (14% off) Walmart$349 AppleThe best iPad goes on sale pretty often, but we still think it's worth purchasing, especially if you just want a solid tablet and don't need it for heavy editing or gaming. There's a solid chance that iPad will get upgraded again this fall, but we don't expect anything too major to come for the base iPad, and this price is right. The 11th-generation iPad has a modern design, two 12-MP cameras, and USB-C charging. Note that this iPad does not support Apple Intelligence, so if you're trying to avoid AI, this is one way to do it.Photograph: Michael SawhPhotograph: Michael SawhPhotograph: Adrienne SoPhotograph: Adrienne SoAppleWatch Series 11$399 $279 (30% off) Amazon$399 Apple$399 $299 (25% off) Best Buy$399 $279 (30% off) WalmartMost PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampeThe best Apple Watch overall has every feature you could want in a smartwatch (aside from satellite messaging, but I presume that isn't a dealbreaker for most of you). There's blood oxygen sensing, sleep tracking, electrocardiogram reading capabilities, and high blood pressure notifications. Best of all, the battery lasts for a full 24 hours, and it'll get watchOS 27.Photograph: Luke LarsenPhotograph: Luke LarsenPhotograph: Luke LarsenPhotograph: Luke LarsenAppleMacBook Air (M5, 2026)$1,099 $949 (14% off) Amazon$1,099 $1,023 (7% off) Walmart$1,099 AppleNone of the MacBooks have a huge discount this year, but the best deal is on the 13-inch MacBook Air. This is the latest M5 model, which also comes with twice the storage: 512 GB. The MacBook Pro has a better screen, but you'll be shocked by just how powerful the latest MacBook Air is. You can get this excellent laptop for under $1,000, and what you get is the MacBook that most people should buy. The cheaper MacBook Neo didn't get much of a discount for Prime Day, unfortunately, which is only $10 off.Read our guide to what MacBook to buy for Prime Day, analyzing the different deals available right now.Photograph: Adrienne SoPhotograph: Adrienne SoPhotograph: Adrienne SoPhotograph: Adrienne SoAppleAirPods Max 2$549 $399 (27% off) Amazon$530 Walmart$530 AppleEveryone loves the AirPods Max 2 headphones, but the complaint has always been the same: It's way too expensive. But for Prime Day, the premium over-ear headphones are $150 off, bringing the price down to $399. That's not cheap, no—but it's more in line with rival headphones like the Sony WH-1000XM6. That's the lowest price on the AirPods Max 2 headphones we've seen in a while.Most PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampePhotograph: Adrienne SoAppleWatch SE 3$279 $229 (18% off) Amazon$249 $219 (12% off) Best Buy$249 AppleThis is the best value Apple Watch. It's compatible with the latest watchOS and has several basic fitness features, though it lacks the extended battery life and some of the more high-tech tracking capabilities of the more-expensive Watch 11. But if you don't need blood oxygen or ECG readings, and you don't need a super-bright display, this affordable smartwatch is a smart buy.Best MagSafe and Accessory DealsPhotograph: Brenda StolyarCourtesy of AmazonSmartishSide Hustle Wallet$30 $24 (20% off) Amazon$35 $30 (14% off) SmartishMagSafe wallets are sometimes fiddly or flimsy, and this is neither. Slide in up to three cards and pop them out with the press of your thumb. They stay secure when you don't need them and are easy to access at the register. This wallet isn't too hard on the eyes, either.Most PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampePhotograph: Brenda StolyarCourtesy of MoftMoftSnap-on Phone Stand & Wallet$30 $24 (20% off) Amazon$30 MoftThis cute MagSafe wallet has room for two cards and doubles as a kickstand. It's a solid minimalist pick.
Photograph: Molly HigginsUAGMetropolis Kevlar MagSafe Wallet$60 $48 (20% off) Amazon$60 $48 (20% off) WalmartOur favorite MagSafe wallet doubles as a kickstand, with room for up to six cards.
Photograph: Simon HillBelkin3-in-1 Qi2 Charging Stand$90 $63 (30% off) Amazon$110 $60 (45% off) Best Buy$110 BelkinMost PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampeIf you have a trio of Apple devices (iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods) this is top of our Apple 3-in-1 wireless chargers guide. A classy mix of chrome and soft-touch black plastic combines with a lovely weighted base so you can pick up your iPhone without pulling the whole charger off your nightstand. The iPhone pad can also be tilted and hold your iPhone vertically or horizontally, with support for StandBy mode. It can fast charge capable iPhone and Apple Watch models and charge any AirPods with a wireless charging case.Photograph: Simon HillAnkerMagGo Power Bank for Apple Watch$90 Anker$90 $50 (44% off) Amazon$90 WalmartThe best power banks are great for keeping your smartphone charged, but what about your Apple Watch? This handy 10,000-mAh battery from Anker has a pop-up Apple Watch charger that delivers 5 watts and supports Nightstand mode.
Photograph: Simon HillPhotograph: Simon HillPhotograph: Simon HillAnkerMagGo UFO 3-in-1 Qi2 Charger$90 Anker$90 $60 (33% off) AmazonOne of the best Apple 3-in-1 travel chargers, this little beauty folds up to resemble a macaron. Open it for a magnetic pad to charge your iPhone at up to 15 watts, a middle pad for your AirPods, and an Apple Watch charger on the right.
Best Apple Case DealsPhotograph: Julian ChokkattuMousLimitless Phone Case$75 $60 (20% off) Amazon$70 MousMous’ Limitless case is gorgeous, and it's one of our favorites for the iPhone 17. We like the various textures and colors, which feel pleasant and remain protective. The Camera Control button is an actual button, and every pressable component is nice and snappy.Most PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampePhotograph: Julian ChokkattuSpigenUltra Hybrid MagFit Case With MagSafe$28 $18 (36% off) AmazonThis sweet iPhone 16 case has a teardown aesthetic and a minimalist footprint.
Photograph: Julian ChokkattuNative UnionActive Case$50 $35 (30% off) Amazon$50 Native UnionOur top iPhone 17 case feels pleasant, is protective without being bulky, and adds style without being too over the top.
